summary: Set up Jest (jest 29, babel-jest with babel-preset-expo, testEnvironment: node — jest-expo preset skipped due to React 19 setup conflict). Wrote 32 tests across 2 files: classService.test.ts (buildWeeklyClasses: 13 cases covering virtual generation, overrides, cancellation, activeFrom/Until boundaries, sort order, multi-template; isVirtualId: 4 cases) and dateUtils.test.ts (toDisplayDate, toStorageDate, isValidDisplayDate: 15 cases). Firebase mocked via jest.mock('../config/firebase') to prevent init in pure-function tests.
